name: Fat Free Banana Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Karo light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Spray a 12-cup muffin pan with cooking spray, coating the cups and the top of the muffins to prevent sticking.
3. In a medium bowl, combine all dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
4. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites lightly.
5. Stir in the mashed bananas, milk, and corn syrup until well blended.
6. Add the flour mixture; stir until just combined.
7. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin cups.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool the muffins on a wire rack for 5 minutes before removing them from the pan.
Variation:
For a quick bread instead of muffins, bake in an 8 x 4 x 2 inch loaf pan at 350°F for 50 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan. Makes 12 servings.
